title: 10 Pack Dust Bags GN Replacement Compatible with Miele Hoover GN Vacuum Cleaner Bags Fits for Classic C1 Complete C2 Complete C3, S2 S5 S8 Series with 3 Motor Protection & 3 Exhaust Filters
features: Premium Material & Performance: Our Koyieioo airclean cylinder vacuum cleaner bags adopt 5 layers of microfiber material for higher filtration, which is highly durable and built to be used longer than other vacuum bags

Wide Compatibility: This vacuum cleaner bags replacement compatible for Miele 3D GN Vacuum Cleaner Bags, Fits for Miele Classic C1, Complete C2, Complete C3, S227, S240, S270, S400, S400i - S456i, S600 - S658, S800 - S858, S2 (S2000 - S2999), S5 (S5000 - S5999), S8 (S8000 - S8999) series canister gn vacuum cleaner bags. Compared to part # 9917730 ‎10632880, SF-SAC 20/30

Fine Air Filtration: Our vacuum cleaner bag replacement for Miele features a 5-layer micro plus filtration system, which is electrostatically charged to capture and hold onto extremely 99.97% of dirt, pet dander, and so on, which helps keep your house truly tidy and improve the air quality at home. It's recommended for you to replace them every 2-3 months

Perfect Blue Dust GN Bags: Vacuum cleaner bags have a built-in sanitary shutter to prevent dust and debris from re-entering your house. The sanitary shutter is spring-loaded, so once you turn on the machine, the shutter will close to prevent dust from escaping. classic c1 bags allow air to easily pass through the bag, so your vacuum is more efficient at lower suction settings

After-Sales Service: ① Package includes: 10 * GN dust bags, 3 * motor protection filters, 3 * exhaust filters, 1 * cleaning brush ② GN vacuum cleaner bags ensure the best performance and a healthy lifestyle. The brand is committed to providing customers with better quality products and more pleasant service. If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us.

Attention Please: Not for Miele guard series. Any use of the brand name or model designation for this product is made solely to demonstrate compatibility. Please read the product description carefully before buying.
